Figure 3: Power of the Lasso when all the N = 500 elements of β(1) are nonzeros for each pair of T and signal strength. Under this setting, the Lasso should find all entries to be nonzero; however, when the signal is strong, it identifies only a small fraction as nonzero even with reasonably large sample sizes.
